languages.text: В толще загадочного куба клубится зеленоватая дымка, скрывающая фантомный образ. Он колеблется и мерцает, будто стремясь проявиться, но тут же распадается на мириады огоньков за миг до обретения формы.

traits.locale_text: В толще загадочного куба клубится зеленоватая дымка, скрывающая фантомный образ. Он колеблется и мерцает, будто стремясь проявиться, но тут же распадается на мириады огоньков за миг до обретения формы.

languages.text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.
languages.original_text: В толще загадочного куба клубится зеленоватая дымка, скрывающая фантомный образ. Он колеблется и мерцает, будто стремясь проявиться, но тут же распадается на мириады огоньков за миг до обретения формы.

traits.locale_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

languages.text: En las profundidades del cubo misterioso hay una fantasmagórica imagen cubierta por una neblina verde. La imagen es intermitente y reluce, como si quisiera solidificarse, pero se desintegra bajo las luces antes de cobrar forma.
languages.original_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

traits.locale_text: En las profundidades del cubo misterioso hay una fantasmagórica imagen cubierta por una neblina verde. La imagen es intermitente y reluce, como si quisiera solidificarse, pero se desintegra bajo las luces antes de cobrar forma.

languages.text: 在那神秘立方体的深处，一团翻腾的绿色迷雾笼罩着一个虚幻的影像。那影像忽明忽暗，闪着微光，仿佛竭力要凝成实体，却总在成形之前便溃散开来，化作一片闪烁跃动的细碎光点。
languages.original_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

traits.locale_text: 在那神秘立方体的深处，一团翻腾的绿色迷雾笼罩着一个虚幻的影像。那影像忽明忽暗，闪着微光，仿佛竭力要凝成实体，却总在成形之前便溃散开来，化作一片闪烁跃动的细碎光点。

languages.text: Dans les profondeurs du cube mystérieux, une image spectrale flotte dans un halo vert vaporeux. L'image scintille, vacille, comme si elle cherchait à se matérialiser, mais se désintègre dans un amas lumineux avant de pouvoir prendre forme.
languages.original_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

traits.locale_text: Dans les profondeurs du cube mystérieux, une image spectrale flotte dans un halo vert vaporeux. L'image scintille, vacille, comme si elle cherchait à se matérialiser, mais se désintègre dans un amas lumineux avant de pouvoir prendre forme.

languages.text: Gizemli küpün derinliklerinde, dönen yeşil bir pusun ardına gizlenmiş hayaletimsi bir görüntü var. Görüntü titreşiyor ve parıldıyor, sanki katılaşmaya çalışıyor ama şekil alamadan parlayan ışıklardan oluşan bir kütleye dönüşerek dağılıyor.
languages.original_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

traits.locale_text: Gizemli küpün derinliklerinde, dönen yeşil bir pusun ardına gizlenmiş hayaletimsi bir görüntü var. Görüntü titreşiyor ve parıldıyor, sanki katılaşmaya çalışıyor ama şekil alamadan parlayan ışıklardan oluşan bir kütleye dönüşerek dağılıyor.

languages.text: Im Inneren des geheimnisvollen Würfels erkennst du ein Phantombild in einem wirbelnden grünen Nebel. Das Bild flackert und schimmert, als wolle es sich manifestieren, aber bevor es Gestalt annehmen kann zerfällt es in eine Masse funkelnder Lichter.
languages.original_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

traits.locale_text: Im Inneren des geheimnisvollen Würfels erkennst du ein Phantombild in einem wirbelnden grünen Nebel. Das Bild flackert und schimmert, als wolle es sich manifestieren, aber bevor es Gestalt annehmen kann zerfällt es in eine Masse funkelnder Lichter.

languages.text: 謎めいた立方体の奥深く、幻影が渦巻く緑の靄に包まれている。その像は、像を結ぼうとするかのように明滅し、揺らめくが、形をなす前に、きらめく光の塊へと崩れ去ってしまう。
languages.original_text: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.

traits.locale_text: 謎めいた立方体の奥深く、幻影が渦巻く緑の靄に包まれている。その像は、像を結ぼうとするかのように明滅し、揺らめくが、形をなす前に、きらめく光の塊へと崩れ去ってしまう。
